# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

### Sourabh Mahajan

#### Assistant Registrar | **Procurement Section**

### Message

Procurement & Inventory section is responsible for the procurement and management of goods and services for IIT Jammu in a transparent and efficient manner.

We are committed to ensuring that our procurement processes are conducted in accordance with the highest standards of integrity and accountability, and that we obtain the best value for our organization. Additionally, we strive to ensure that all inventory is properly accounted for and managed efficiently.

# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

- Procurement Management
- Inventory Management
- Team
- Contact Us

Inventory management is an important aspect of managing educational institutions like IITs. IIT Jammu has a wide range of inventory items, including laboratory equipment, furniture, computers and peripherals, books, and other educational materials.

The main function of Inventory section is to accurately track inventory levels and keeping accurate records of the goods in stock. Recording all non-consumable equipment/items in the inventory database using E governance provides an efficient way to track inventory levels and ensure that all inventory items are properly cataloged and labeled. Having an inventory database with information on each asset's owner can also help in identifying who is responsible for maintaining the asset and ensuring its proper usage.

IIT Jammu have rigorous and stringent purchasing policies to ensure fair usage of public funds and to demonstrate transparency to the public.

As per GFR rules, common-use goods and services must be procured through Government e-Marketplace (GeM) and that only registered buyers may make purchases. This helps to ensure that purchases are made from trusted vendors and that due diligence is done to ensure that items available on GeM are indeed procured through GeM. Those Items not available on GeM may be procured through an open tender process.

Procurement process may be lengthy and involve multiple steps, including forming purchase committees, releasing open tenders, and conducting due diligence. It's important to be patient and allow sufficient time for these processes to be completed, particularly for expensive e

# Page Title: Procurement & Inventory Management | IIT Jammu

### Procurement Management

IIT Jammu have rigorous and stringent purchasing policies to ensure fair usage of public funds and to demonstrate transparency to the public. As per GFR rules, common-use goods and services must be procured through Government e-Marketplace (GeM) and that only registered buyers may make purchases. This helps to ensure that purchases are made from trusted vendors and that due diligence is done to ensure that items available on GeM are indeed procured through GeM. Those Items not available on GeM may be procured through an open tender process.

### Message
